content.en:
Ye Tian's method was very simple, that is, to copy the body of Tongyang's controller.

Of course, it is not the Tongyang controller in its heyday, but the Tongyang controller at the eight-domain level.

After all, Ye Tian was only at the level of the Eight Domains, so he could naturally only copy the Tongyang Controller of the Eight Domains level.

His copying talent is absolutely undetectable even by the machine spirit of Tongyang Mountain, once he copies the body of the Tongyang master, when he enters Tongyang Mountain in a seriously injured and dying state, he will definitely be noticed by the machine spirit of Tongyang Mountain.

The machine spirit will definitely probe his body and soul will, etc., and find that in addition to cultivation, the others are really Tongyang controllers, and I am afraid that they will be dumbfounded.

Although the machine spirit knows that the master of Tongyang has fallen, what if it is reborn in a special way?

This kind of thing is not impossible, but there is an extremely low probability.

At that time, the machine spirit is afraid that he will really think that he is the master of Tongyang who has returned from rebirth, so as to bring him into the interior of Tongyang Mountain and treat his injuries.

At the critical moment, he could directly grasp the machine spirit and control Tongyang Mountain.

Of course, it's also possible that the machine spirit will ignore him.

However, you have to give it a try, in case the machine spirit is extremely loyal to the Tongyang master, and even loses his mind, then it will definitely succeed.

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to spy on time and space, looking for the figure of the fallen Tongyang controller, and only in the past time and space could he see the fallen Tongyang controller and know his body.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to see the time and space figure of the eight-domain level Tongyang controller, and after the copy talent was recorded, the copy body was dispersed.

Ye Tian could only reproduce one body, so he had to disperse this body.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian copied the body of Tongyang's controller little by little, spending huge resources and time.

It was a long time before the replica body finally condensed.

Immediately.

Ye Tian took a mask, concealed his breath, and went from the thirteenth Boundary River to Tongyang Mountain in the Origin Realm Sea again.

Ye Tian's arrival did not attract too much attention from the Eternal Controller, and Ye Tian quickly turned into a battered and dying appearance, plunged headlong into Tongyang Mountain, and crashed into a formation.

And at this time, Ye Tian's mask cracked, and there was no longer a trace of hiding.

In fact, Ye Tian's injury was not a disguise, he had injured himself internally, and he was indeed seriously injured and dying.

However, he is not afraid, even if he is really seriously injured and dying, he still has one of the ten secret techniques of life, even if it is seriously injured, he can save his life, and the injury will recover quickly.

Therefore, he is not afraid to make himself look seriously injured.

......

Tongyang Mountain, deep.

The moment Ye Tian came in, the machine spirit of Tongyang Mountain noticed it.

"Master? No, isn't the master falling?"

The machine spirit was confused.

But he urged the magic circle and carefully spied on Ye Tian's body and soul breath.

"Eight Domains level, the cultivation is very low, but the body and soul are clearly the master!"

The machine spirit was surprised.

As the strongest machine spirit in Tongyang's controller, his knowledge is naturally not short, even if he is disguised, it is impossible to disguise to this extent!

"Try the Tongyang mirror before the master's death, if it can echo the Tongyang mirror, it is the master!"

Thereupon.

The spirit of the instrument urged the Tongyang Mirror, and the Tongyang Mirror passed through the layers of magic circles and entered the magic circle where Ye Tian was.

Airplanes!!!!

Tongyang Mirror released a faint light, shining on Ye Tian's body, and soon Tongyang Mirror shook with joy.

"It's the master!

The machine spirit inside the Tongyang Mirror said excitedly.

There is naturally more than one instrument spirit in Tongyang Mountain, and there is also a tool spirit inside the Tongyang mirror.

And it is the instrument spirit that controls the entire Tongyang Mountain magic circle, and it is the instrument spirit that belongs to the Tongyang Pagoda.

Now.

Tongyang Pagoda was excited, and even Tongyang Mirror recognized it, which means that this is his master.

It didn't have time to think about it, because the owner's injuries were getting worse.

"Although the master fell before, he may not be extinguished, and he survived in some special way, and finally got out of the predicament, and encountered danger again, so he rushed back to Tongyang Mountain, it must be so!"

"First bring the master into the Tongyang Pagoda, and give him the healing treasures left by the master before his death. "

The machine spirit said.

Airplanes!!!!

The magic circle was urged, and Ye Tian's body was moved to the depths of Tongyang Mountain.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Soon, he was moved to the interior of the Tongyang Pagoda.

And at this time, the machine spirit appeared, and it brought a lot of healing treasures.

"Master, you must recover!"

The machine spirit repaired Ye Tian's injuries.

And suddenly.

Ye Tian performed the secret of life for himself, and the injuries on his body recovered at an extremely fast speed.

"Hey, the master's injuries recovered so quickly, are these treasures I took out so effective?"

The machine spirit said in confusion.

Suddenly, his expression changed.

So at this time, Ye Tian made a move.

Under the casting of the secret of time, his mind reacted too quickly, far beyond this machine spirit.

Before the machine spirit could react, Ye Tian grabbed the machine spirit with one hand.

"Seal!"

A set of sealing secret techniques specifically for machine spirits has been cast, this set of sealing secret techniques is from Wanyuan Mountain, but it is not something that the machine spirit of Tongyang Pagoda can resist!

In an instant, the spirit of Tongyang Pagoda was sealed.

"Master, what are you doing here, why are you sealing me?"

The machine spirit shouted.

"I'm sorry, I'm not your master!" Ye Tian sighed.

"Impossible, you are obviously the master, and your body can be disguised, but your soul breath and origin are the master, and even Tongyang Mirror has recognized you!"

Ye Tian shook his head, "This is my method, I don't need to explain it to you." "

Immediately, Ye Tian began to perform the secret of death for this machine spirit.

The Secret of Death is a secret technique for protection, but it can also control life and death, and the machine spirit is also a special life, so it can naturally be used to cast the Secret of Death.

Soon, Ye Tian successfully cast the Secret of Death on the Machine Spirit, and only then did he uncover the seal.

"Bad guys, you look for death!"

The machine spirit was furious and wanted to control the formation of Tongyang Pagoda and Tongyang Mountain to suppress Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian cast the secret of initiating death, causing the machine spirit to lose control in an instant.

"You can't hurt me, so consider me Lord. "

Ye Tian said.

"Impossible!"

The machine spirit said arrogantly.

Seeing this, Ye Tian had no choice but to forcibly refine the Tongyang Pagoda.

Anyway, the machine spirit couldn't resist anymore, so there was no way for him to forcibly refine it.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian could be regarded as having completely refined the Tongyang Pagoda, a high-ranking control realm soldier.

Under the dual control of the Secret of Death and the refining of the Tongyang Pagoda, the machine spirit can be regarded as completely resigned to its fate.

"Master!"

Tongyang Pagoda Instrument Spirit shouted helplessly.
